articles.author: Mithil Aggarwal
articles.title: Use the stairs, work from home: Asia is already making big changes as oil prices spike - NBC News
articles.description: The fallout of the U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran and the subsequent effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has reached Asia with authorities from New Delhi to Manila implementing emergency measures to shield consumers from the mounting shortages and surging …
articles.content: HONG KONG The fallout from the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran and the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz is being felt sharply in Asia, with authorities from New Delhi to Manila implementing emerg… [+2916 chars]
